diagrams.title: Schedule Types Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the inclusion relationship between Strict, Cascadeless, and Recoverable schedules
diagrams.purpose: Visualize that every Strict schedule is Cascadeless, and every Cascadeless is Recoverable

diagrams.title: Precedence Graph Example
diagrams.description: A directed graph showing transaction dependencies for conflict detection
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to test conflict serializability using graph theory

diagrams.title: Dirty Read Scenario
diagrams.description: Timeline showing dirty read problem in non-recoverable schedules
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why recoverability matters - prevents inconsistent states after transaction failure

diagrams.title: Transaction State Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows lifecycle of a database transaction through different states
diagrams.purpose: Understanding when recovery procedures are invoked

visuals.title: Characterizing Schedules Based On Recoverability
visuals.description: Visual diagram for characterizing schedules based on recoverability
